result.stdout:
[04:11:24 INF] JELLOG CLI (https://jellog.com)
[04:11:24 INF] Version 6.0.0-dev (Development)
[04:11:24 INF] 
Usage:

    jellog <command> <target> [options]

Command List:

    > help: Show command line help. Write ` jellog help <command> `
    > prompt: Starts with prompt mode.
    > new: Generate a new solution based on the JELLOG startup templates.
    > update: Update all JELLOG related NuGet packages and NPM packages in a solution or project to the latest version.
    > add-package: Add a new JELLOG package to a project by adding related NuGet package dependencies and [DependsOn(...)] attributes.
    > add-module: Add a multi-package module to a solution by finding all packages of the module, finding related projects in the solution and adding each package to the corresponding project in the solution.
    > list-modules: List open source application modules
    > list-templates: Lists available templates to be created.
    > generate-proxy: Generates client service proxies and DTOs to consume HTTP APIs.
    > remove-proxy: Remove client service proxies and DTOs to consume HTTP APIs.
    > translate: Mainly used to translate JELLOG's resources (JSON files) easier.
    > build: Builds a dotnet repository and dependent repositories or a solution.
    > create-migration-and-run-migrator 
    > install-libs: Install NPM Packages for MVC / Razor Pages and Blazor Server UI types.
    > clean: Delete all BIN and OBJ folders in current folder.
    > cli: Update or remove JELLOG CLI. See https://docs.jellog.io/en/jellog/latest/CLI

To get a detailed help for a command:

    jellog help <command>

See the documentation for more info: https://docs.jellog.com
